# California Consumer Privacy Act Regulations

Jurisdiction: United States - California
Region: US-CA
Citation: California Consumer Privacy Act Regulations
Authority: California Privacy Protection Agency
Source URL: https://cppa.ca.gov/regulations/
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, data_subject_rights, marketing_opt_out, sensitive_data, accountability
Keywords: CCPA regulations, CPPA regulations, notice at collection, privacy policy, opt-out

## Summary
California regulations implementing CCPA/CPRA notice, request, opt-out, sensitive personal information, dark pattern, and enforcement rules.

## Key compliance obligations
- Implement detailed notice-at-collection and privacy-policy requirements.
- Honor opt-out preference signals and rights requests.
- Avoid dark-pattern consent and choice designs.
